title: Junior Accountant
description:
Diploma or Bachelor's Degree in Accounting, Finance, or with related field of study with relevant work experience
Duties and Responsibilities:
- Assist in recording daily financial transactions
- Prepare and maintain accounting documents and records
- Support accounts payable and receivable processes
- Perform bank reconciliations
- Help prepare financial reports and statements
- Maintain filing systems for financial data

title: Senior Electrical Engineer
description:
Bachelor’s  Degree in Electrical Engineering with related field of study  with relevant work experience.
Duties & Responsibilities:
- Prepare and review electrical design drawings for building projects, including power and extra low voltage (ELV) systems
- Develop detailed electrical layouts, schematics, and technical documentation using AutoCAD
- Perform quantity take-offs and measurements from drawings and site data
- Prepare technical specifications and scope of work for electrical installations
- Conduct cost estimation, prepare bills of quantities (BOQ), and develop price quotations
- Support project teams with technical inputs during planning and execution phases
- Review contractor submissions and ensure compliance with design and specifications

title: Receptionist
description:
Bachelor’s Degree in any field of study with relevant work experience.
Duties & Responsibilities:
- Maintain active and professional communication with clients and visitors.
- Greet and check in visitors in a friendly and professional manner.
- Answer and direct phone calls appropriately.
- Handle customer complaints efficiently and professionally.
- Manage the front desk area and ensure it is clean and organized.
- Receive, sort, and distribute incoming mail and documents.

title: Accounting and Finance Officer
description:
Bachelor's Degree in Accounting, Finance or with related field of study with relevant work experience.
Duties and Responsibilities
- Maintain and update accurate financial records, ledgers, and supporting documentation.
- Prepare journal entries and reconcile accounts to ensure proper coding of transactions.
-  Oversee and monitor accounts payable (AP) and accounts receivable (AR).
- Support monthly, quarterly, and annual financial reporting.
- Assist with audits, tax filings, and compliance requirements.
- Collaborate with internal teams to improve financial processes and efficiency.

title: Product Quality Assurance and Control Specialist I
description:
Diploma  or Bachelor’s  Degree in Chemical Engineering, Industrial Chemistry, or Chemistry or with related field of study with relevant work experience.
Duties & Responsibilities:
- Monitor production activities to ensure compliance with quality standards.
- Control incoming raw materials and auxiliary materials against specifications.
- Prepare and monitor glue viscosity (40–46 seconds), record data in logbooks and checklists.
- Perform quality checks on main tank glue, single feeders, and production lines.
- Inspect job orders, approve production start, and identify waste types to prevent recurrence.

title: Real Estate Sales Agent
description:
Bachelor's Degree in any field of study with relevant work experience
Duties and Responsibilities:
- Actively sell our Real estate packages to clients
- Approach businesses and individuals to introduce and sell our real estate product.
- Continuously seek new opportunities to expand our client base and increase sales.
- Stay informed about market trends and competitors.
- Build and maintain strong, long-term relationships with clients to encourage repeat business and referrals.
- Work closely with marketing and other departments to align sales strategies and campaigns.

title: Motorist (Liaison Officer)
description:
10ኛ ክፍል ወይም ከዛ በላይ ያጠናቀቀ እና የታደሰ የሞተረኛ መንጃ ፍቃድ ያለው አግባብነት ካለው የስራ ልምድ ጋር
ዋና ዋና ኃላፊነቶች
- ሰነዶች፣ ፓርሴሎች ወይም እቃዎችን በጊዜ ማድረስ
 - የትራፊክ ህጎችን እና የደህንነት መመሪያዎችን መከተል 
- የሞተሩን የቴክኒክ ሁኔታ እና የንጽህና ሁኔታ ማረጋገጥ
- የሞተሩን ነዳጅ፣ ዘይት እና ጎማ ሁኔታ መከታተል 
- የመድረሻ ማረጋገጫ (delivery confirmation) መረጃ መሰብሰብ 
- ከደንበኞች እና ከሥራ ባልደረቦች ጋር መልካም የሥራ ግንኙነት መፍጠር
- የተላኩ እቃዎችን ደህንነት መጠበቅ 
- የተሽከርካሪ ብልሽትን ወይም ጉዳትን ለሚመለከተው አካል ሪፖርት ማድረግ
- ከመንግስትና ከግል ድርጅቶች ጋር ያሉ ጉዳዮችን በቅርበት መከታተልና ማስፈጸም

title: Junior Accountant
description:
የመጀመሪያ ዲግሪ በአካውንቲንግ ወይም በተመሳሳይ የትምህርት መስክ የተመረቀ/ቀች አግባብነት ካለው የስራ ልምድ ጋር
ዋና ዋና ኃላፊነቶች
- የሂሳብ ሰነዶችን በተገቢ መልኩ መያዝና ማዘጋጀት
- የገቢና ወጪ መዝገቦችን ማስተካከልና መከታተል
- የአካውንቲንግ ሶፍትዌሮችን (Peachtree, Excel) መጠቀም
- የወርሃዊ፣ የሩብ ዓመት እና የዓመታዊ የፋይናንስ ሪፖርቶችን ማዘጋጀት
- ከከፍተኛ ሂሳብ ባለሙያዎች ጋር የሂሳብ ሥራዎችን በጋራ መስራት
- ሌሎች ከስራው ጋር ተያያዥ የሆኑ ተግባራትን መፈጸም

title: Enterprise Training Manager
description:
Master’s Degree (MA) in Education, Business Administration, Human Resource Management, or related fields with relevant work experience. 
Duties & Responsibilities:
- Lead the overall enterprise training strategy aligned with business growth and enterprise needs.
- Build and maintain strong relationships with training providers, consulting firms, and independent trainers.
-Develop and manage a database of qualified trainers, consultants, and service providers.
- Manage the full lifecycle of training provider engagement, including identification, onboarding, coordination, and performance management.
- Lead curriculum development, review, and standardization to ensure quality and consistency.

title: Nanny
description:
10ኛ/12ኛ ክፍል ያጠናቀቀች እና በህጻናት አያያዝ እና ክብካቤ /ሞግዚት/ ስልጠና ሰርተፊኬት ያላት አግባብነት ካለው የስራ ልምድ ጋር
ዋና ዋና ኃላፊነቶች
- ህጻኑ በማንኛውም ጊዜ ደህንነቱ በተጠበቀ ሁኔታ ላይ መሆኑን ማረጋገጥና ከአደጋ መጠበቅ
- የህጻኑን የግል ንጽህና መጠበቅ
- ከህጻኑ እድሜ ጋር የሚመጣጠኑ አዝናኝ እና አስተማሪ ጨዋታዎችን ማጫወት
- የህጻኑን መጫወቻዎች፣ የመመገቢያ ቁሳቁሶች እና መኝታ ክፍል በንጽህና መያዝ
- ስለ ህጻኑ ውሎ፣ ጤንነትና እድገት ለወላጆች በየቀኑ መረጃ መስጠት
- የህጻኑን የጤና ሁኔታ  በንቃት መከታተል እና ለወላጆች ወዲያውኑ ማሳወቅ

title: Driver (Liaison Officer)
description:
10ኛ ክፍል ወይም ከዛ በላይ ያጠናቀቀ እና ህዝብ 1 የታደሰ መንጃ ፍቃድ ያለው አግባብነት ካለው የስራ ልምድ ጋር
ዋና ዋና ኃላፊነቶች
- ኃላፊዎችን ወደ ስራ፣ ስብሰባ እና ሌሎች መዳረሻዎች በጊዜ ማጓጓዝ 
- የመንገድ ህጎችን እና የደህንነት መመሪያዎችን በጥንቃቄ መከተል
የተሽከርካሪን ንጽህና እና ደህንነት መጠበቅ
- የተሽከርካሪውን ነዳጅ፣ ዘይት እና ሌሎች ቴክኒክ ሁኔታዎችን መከታተል 
- የተሽከርካሪ ብልሽትን ወይም ጉዳትን በአፋጣኝ ሪፖርት ማድረግ
- ሰነዶችን ወይም መመሪያዎችን በአግባቡ ማድረስ
- የመልዕክቶችን ሚስጥራዊነትን መጠበቅ 
- ከሥራ ኃላፊዎች ጋር መልካም የሥራ ግንኙነት መፍጠር
- ከመንግስትና ከግል ድርጅቶች ጋር ያሉ ጉዳዮችን በቅርበት መከታተልና ማስፈጸም

title: Senior Structural Engineer
description:
የመጀመሪያ ዲግሪ ወይም ሁለተኛ ዲግሪ ወይም ፒኤችዲ በስትራክቸራል ኢንጅነሪንግ፣ ብሪጅ ኢንጅነሪንግ፣ ሲቪል ምህንድስና፣ ኮንስትራክሽን ቴክኖሎጂ እና ማኔጅመንት ወይም በተመሳሳይ የትምሀርት መስክ የተመረቀ/ቀች አግባብነት ካለው የስራ ልምድ ጋር
ዋና ዋና ኃላፊነቶች
- የህንፃ እና የተለያዩ መዋቅሮችን ዲዛይን ማዘጋጀትና እንደ አስፈላጊነቱ ማሻሻል
- የግንባታ ስዕሎችን (Drawings) በጥራት ማዘጋጀት፣ መከለስ እና ማጽደቅ
- የቴክኒክ ጥናቶችን ማካሄድ እና ወቅታዊ የሥራ አፈጻጸም ሪፖርቶችን ማቅረብ
- ከአርኪቴክቶች፣ ከኮንትራክተሮች እና ከሌሎች ባለሙያዎች ጋር በቅንጅት መስራት
- የግንባታ ሂደቱን በአካል ተገኝቶ መቆጣጠር እና የጥራት ደረጃውን ማረጋገጥ
- የግንባታ ደህንነት መመሪያዎችን እና የሙያ ስታንዳርዶችን በጥብቅ መከተል

title: Quantity Surveyor
description:
የመጀመሪያ ዲግሪ ወይም ሁለተኛ ዲግሪ በሲቪል ምህንድስና፣ ኮንስትራክሽን ቴክኖሎጂ እና ማኔጅመንት፣ ሰርቬይንግ ኢንጂነሪንግ ወይም በተመሳሳይ የትምሀርት መስክ የተመረቀ/ቀች አግባብነት ካለው የስራ ልምድ ጋር
ዋና ዋና ኃላፊነቶች
- የፕሮጀክቱን በጀት በቅርብ መከታተል፣ አላስፈላጊ ወጪዎችን መቆጣጠርና የፋይናንስ አጠቃቀምን የሚገልጹ ወቅታዊ ሪፖርቶችን ማቅረብ
- ከመሐንዲሶች፣ ከአማካሪዎችና ከኮንትራክተሮች ጋር በቅንጅት በመሥራት የፕሮጀክቱ የፋይናንስና የቴክኒክ ጥራት እንዲጠበቅ ማድረግ
- ጥራቱን የጠበቀ የሥራ ዝርዝርና የመጠን መግለጫ (BOQ) ማዘጋጀትና ትክክለኛነቱን ማረጋገጥ
- የኮንትራት ሰነዶችን ማዘጋጀት እና መቆጣጠር
- የህግ እና የኮንትራት መመሪያዎችን መከተል
- ከኮንትራክተሮች የሚቀርቡ የክፍያ ጥያቄዎች መመርመር እና ማረጋገጥ

title: Vehicle Dispatch and Monitoring Staff II
description:
ደረጃ 1/2/3/4 በማኔጅመንት፣ አውቶ መካኒክ ወይም በተመሳሳይ የትምሀርት መስክ የተመረቀ/ቀች አግባብነት ካለው የስራ ልምድ ጋር
ዋና ዋና ኃላፊነቶች
-  የተቋሙን የዕለት ተዕለት የተሽከርካሪ ስምሪት ዕቅድ ማዘጋጀት እና ተሽከርካሪዎች በተገቢው ሰዓትና ቦታ እንዲሰማሩ ማድረግ
- የተሽከርካሪዎችን የሥራ ሰዓት፣ የተጓዙበትን ርቀት (K.M) እና የነዳጅ ፍጆታን በየቀኑ መመዝገብና መቆጣጠር
- የጂ.ፒ.ኤስ (GPS) መከታተያ መሣሪያዎችን በመጠቀም የተሽከርካሪዎችን እንቅስቃሴ በቅርብ መከታተል እና ከተፈቀደላቸው መስመር ውጭ እንዳይወጡ መቆጣጠር
- የተሽከርካሪዎችን የጥገና እና የሰርቪስ ጊዜ በመከታተል በሰዓቱ ጥገና እንዲደረግላቸው ለሚመለከተው ክፍል ማሳወቅ

title: Assistant Surveyor
description:
6ኛ/8ኛ/10ኛ /12ኛ ክፍል ያጠናቀቀ/ቀች ወይም ደረጃ I በሰርቬይንግ ወይም በተመሳሳይ የትምሀርት መስክ የተመረቀ/ቀች አግባብነት ካለው የስራ ልምድ ጋር
ዋና ዋና ኃላፊነቶች
- ከከፍተኛ ሰርቬየር ጋር በመተባበር የመሬት አቀማመጥ፣ የወሰን እና የግንባታ ልኬት ሥራዎችን ማከናወን
- የተለያዩ የልኬት መሣሪያዎችን  ለሥራ ዝግጁ ማድረግ፣ ማስተካከልና በትክክል ጥቅም ላይ ማዋል
- የመሬት ገጽታ ካርታዎችን  እና የሳይት ፕላኖችን በማዘጋጀት ሂደት ላይ የቴክኒክ ድጋፍ መስጠት
- በሥራ ቦታ ላይ የደህንነት መመሪያዎችን እና የጥንቃቄ ደንቦችን በአግባቡ መተግበር
- የመለኪያ ውጤቶችን ትክክለኛነት መረጋገጥ
- የቴክኒክ ሪፖርቶችን እና ሰነዶችን ማዘጋጀት

title: Senior Machinery Training Officer
description:
የመጀመሪያ ዲግሪ ወይም ሁለተኛ ዲግሪ ወይም ፒኤችዲ በሜካኒካል ኢንጅነሪንግ፣ አውቶሞቲቪ ቴክኖሎጂ  ወይም በተመሳሳይ የትምሀርት መስክ የተመረቀ/ቀች አግባብነት ካለው የስራ ልምድ ጋር
ዋና ዋና ኃላፊነቶች
- ለማሽነሪ ኦፕሬተሮች የሚሆኑ አጠቃላይ የሥልጠና ፍላጎቶችን መለየት፣ የሥልጠና ዕቅዶችን ማዘጋጀት እና ተግባራዊነታቸውን መከታተል
ለአዳዲስ ኦፕሬተሮች መሰረታዊ ስልጠና መስጠት
- ስለ ማሽነሪዎች የዕለት ተዕለት አያያዝ፣ የጥገና ሥርዓት እና የአሠራር ደህንነት መመሪያዎች ዝርዝር ትምህርት መስጠት
- የስልጠና ውጤትን መገምገም እና ሪፖርት ማዘጋጀት
- ከኦፕሬሽን እና ከጥገና ቡድኖች ጋር በጋራ መስራት
- የሥልጠናውን ውጤታማነት በመገምገም ወቅታዊ የሥራ አፈፃፀም ሪፖርቶችን ለሥራ አመራሩ ማቅረብ

title: Water Supply Engineer
description: Master's Degree in Water Supply Engineering, Sanitary Engineering, or with related field of study with relevant work experience

title: Project Manager (Road)(Vacancy Code- 001/2026)
description:
Master’s degree or a Bachelor’s degree in Civil Engineering, or a related field of study, with relevant work experience.
Duties & Responsibilities:
- Ensuring that each stage of the project is being executed on time and within budget.
- Direct and supervise the development of the project.
- Selecting and leading the project team.
- Ensure compliance with standards set by the organization for program / project management.
- Organize logistics and procurement for the project.

title: Accountant
description:
Bachelor's Degree in Accounting or with related field of study with relevant work experience
Duties and Responsibilities
- Prepare and maintain accurate financial records
- Record daily financial transactions (income, expenses, payments, and receipts)
- Prepare monthly, quarterly, and annual financial reports
- Assist in budgeting and financial planning processes
- Ensure compliance with accounting standards, tax regulations, and company policies
- Monitor accounts payable and receivable, ensuring timely payments and collections
- Support audits by providing required documentation and reports
- Maintain proper documentation of financial transactions and records

title: Deputy Mechanical & Electrical (M&E) Manager
description:
Diploma or Bachelor’s Degree in Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Water Supply & Drainage Engineering, Electro Mechanical Engineering or with related field of study with relevant work experience
Duties and Responsibilities
- Assist the M&E Manager and Project Manager in the overall management and coordination of Mechanical & Electrical works for the Olympia Project.
- Supervise and control M&E construction activities, including electrical systems, low-voltage systems, plumbing, drainage, HVAC, firefighting systems, and equipment installations.
- Resolve on-site technical and construction-related M&E issues effectively and efficiently.
- Manage M&E manpower, materials, and equipment allocation on-site.

title: Senior Sociologist
description: የመጀመሪያ ዲግሪ ወይም ሁለተኛ ዲግሪ ወይም ፒኤችዲ በዴቨሎፕመንት ስተዲስ፣ ሳይኮሎጂ፣ ሶሻል ወርክ፣ ሶሾሎጂ፣ ሶሾሎጂ ኤንድ ሶሻል አንትሮፖሎጂ፣ ጀንደር፣ ኢንቫይሮመንት ኤንድ ጄንደር፣ በፖለቲካል ሳይንስ፣ በፖለቲካል ሳይንስ ኤንድ ኢንተርናሽናል ሪሊሽን፣ ፐብሊክ አድሚኒስትሬሽን ወይም በተመሳሳይ የትምሀርት መስክ የተመረቀ/ቀች አግባብነት ካለው የስራ ልምድ ጋር

title: Nurse
description:
Bachelor’s Degree or Diploma in Nursing from a recognized institution with relevant work experience.
Duties & Responsibilities:
- Provide nursing care and support to patients according to medical standards.
- Monitor patient health, vital signs, and progress.
- Administer medications and treatments as prescribed by physicians.
- Assist doctors during examinations and medical procedures.
- Maintain accurate patient records and documentation.
- Educate patients and families on health conditions and care plans.

title: Veterinarian
description: የመጀመሪያ ዲግሪ በእንስሳት ህክምና ወይም በተመሳሳይ የትምህርት መስክ የተመረቀ/ቀች አግባብነት ካለው የስራ ልምድ ጋር

title: Marketing Officer
description:
Bachelor’s Degree in Marketing, Business Administration, Management, or any related field with relevant work experience
Duties & Responsibilities:
- Develop and implement marketing strategies and campaigns.
- Conduct market research to identify trends and opportunities.
- Promote company products and services through various channels.
- Manage social media platforms and digital marketing activities.
- Coordinate marketing events, promotions, and campaigns.
- Monitor and analyze campaign performance and prepare reports.

title: Project Manager
description:
Bachelor’s Degree or Master’s Degree in Civil Engineering, Construction Management, or with related field of study with relevant work experience
Duties & Responsibilities
- Plan, execute, and close projects according to scope, schedule, and budget
- Lead and coordinate project teams, consultants, and contractors
- Prepare project plans, schedules, and progress reports
- Monitor project performance and implement corrective actions when required
- Manage risks, changes, and contractual issues
- Ensure compliance with quality, safety, and regulatory requirements
- Report regularly to senior management and clients

title: Waitress
description:
10th/12th grade completion with relevant work experience
Duties and Responsibilities
- Greet and welcome customers in a friendly and professional manner
- Present menus and explain dishes, specials, and beverages
- Take accurate food and drink orders from customers
- Enter orders correctly and communicate them to kitchen staff
- Serve food and beverages promptly and correctly
- Check on customers regularly to ensure satisfaction
- Set up tables before service and clear tables after guests leave
- Maintain cleanliness and hygiene in the dining and service areas

title: Office Engineer
description:
Bachelor’s Degree in Civil Engineering or with related field of study with relevant work experience
Duties & Responsibilities
- Prepare quantity take-offs and cost estimates
- Prepare payments for contractors 
- Review drawings and technical documents
- Assist in preparing reports, submittals, and documentation
- Track material usage and site progress
- Support project coordinator and record keeping
- Ensure documents are updated and properly filed

title: Data Clerk
description:
Diploma or Bachelor’s Degree in Business, Accounting, Statistics, IT, or with related field of study with relevant work experience
Duties and Responsibilities
- Enter, update, and maintain accurate data in databases and systems
- Verify data for accuracy, completeness, and consistency
- Organize and file physical and electronic records
- Retrieve data and prepare reports as required
- Perform regular data backups and ensure data security
- Review and correct errors in data entries
- Maintain confidentiality of sensitive information
- Support other administrative tasks as assigned

title: Senior Finance Officer
description:
Bachelor's Degree or Master's Degree in Accounting, Finance or with related field of study with relevant work experience
Duties & Responsibilities
- Ensure the transactions are properly coded and posted in the system as outlined in the company financial manual.
- Prepare journal summaries
- Establish, maintain and reconcile the periodic financial transactions as required.
- Perform the monthly bank reconciliation once in every month end and as required.
- Administer and monitor the financial system to ensure that the finances are maintained in an accurate and timely manner.
- Maintain financial files and records which are under his/ her custody.

title: Project Coordinator
description:
Bachelor’s Degree in Civil Engineering, Construction Management or with related field of study with relevant work experience.
Duties & Responsibilities
- Coordinate daily project activities and schedules
- Assist the Project Manager in planning and execution
- Track project progress and prepare regular reports
- Coordinate meetings, minutes, and follow-ups
- Support procurement, logistics, and site coordination activities
- Ensure timely communication between site, consultants, and management
- Maintain project documentation and records

title: Senior Accountant
description:
Diploma or Degree in Accounting, Finance or with related field of study with relevant work experience
Duties and Responsibilities
- Manage all accounting transactions 
- Publish financial statements in time 
- Handle monthly, quarterly and annual closings 
- Reconcile accounts payable and receivable 
- Ensure timely bank payments 
- Compute taxes and prepare tax returns
- Manage balance sheets and profit/loss statements
- Report on the company’s financial health and liquidity
- Audit financial transactions and documents

title: Assistant Professor
description: PhD in Library and Information Science, Information Science, Information Systems, Computer Science, Leadership or with related field of study with relevant work experience

title: Shop Sales Associate
description:
10ኛ ክፍል እና ከዛ በላይ ያጠናቀቀ/ቀች አግባብነት ካለው የስራ ልምድ ጋር
ዋና ዋና ኃላፊነቶች
- ደንበኞችን በአክብሮት እና በፍቅር መቀበል 
- በሱቁ ውስጥ ስላሉት እቃዎች ለመማር ፈጣን መሆንና ሽያጭ ማከናወን 
- እቃዎችን በሚያምር እና በሚስብ መልኩ ማስተካከል
- ሱቁን ንፁህ እና የተደራጀ ማድረግ
- የሱቁን ህጎች እና መመሪያዎች መከተል

title: Call Center Agent
description:
Bachelor's Degree in Business Administration or with related field of study. with relevant work experience.
Duties and Responsibilities፡ 
- Track, trace, and monitor shipments in real time
- Create and update customer records and shipment data in the system
- Provide product, service, and process information to customers
- Escalate complex issues to the supervisor or logistics team when necessary
- Maintain call logs and follow standard operating procedures (SOPs)

title: Assistant Event Manager
description:
Bachelor’s Degree in Event Management, Marketing, Business Administration, Hospitality Management, or with related field of study with relevant work experience
Duties & Responsibilities:

title: Heavy Truck Driver
description:
የትምህርት ደረጃ: 10ኛ ክፍልን ያጠናቀቀ የታደሰ የደረቅ ሶስት ወይም አምስተኛ /5ተኛ/ደረጃ መንጃ ፈቃድ ያለውና ከባድ መኪና ተሸከርካሪ አሽከርካሪ አግባብ ከሆነ የስራ ልምድ ያለው
ተግባራት እና ኃላፊነቶች:
- ዕለታዊ የፍተሻ ስራዎችን ማከናወን (ዘይት፣ ብሬክ፣ ጎማ)፣ ጥቃቅን ጥገናዎችን ማድረግ እና የመኪናውን ጥራት ጠብቆ ማቆየት
- ትጉህ እና በጥንካሬ ለመስራት ዝግጁ የሆነ
- የሲጋራ እና የአልኮል ሱስ የሌለበት
- ከፖሊስ ጣቢያ የባህሪ ማረጋገጫ (Police Clearance) ማቅረብ የሚችል
- የሥራ ዋስትና (Employment Guarantor) ማቅረብ የሚችል

title: Transport Operations Officer
description:
ዲፕሎማ ወይም የመጀመሪያ ዲግሪ በሎጂስቲክስ ኤንድ ሰፕላይ ቼን ማኔጅመንት፣ ማርኬቲንግ ማኔጅመንት፣ በንግድ አስተዳደር፣ ቢዝነስ አድሚኒስትሬሽን ወይም በተመሳሳይ የትምህርት መስክ የተመረቀ/ቀች አግባብነት ካለው የስራ ልምድ ጋር
ዋና ዋና ኃላፊነቶች
- የትራንስፖርት ኦፕሬሽኖችን ማስተባበር፣ መምራት እና መቆጣጠር 
- የተሽከርካሪ እንቅስቃሴን መቆጣጠር እና አፈፃፀምን ማሻሻል 
- የኦፕሬሽን እቅዶችን ማዘጋጀት እና አፈፃፀማቸውን መከታተል 
- ከአሽከርካሪዎች፣ ከሎጂስቲክስ እና ከሌሎች ቡድኖች ጋር ተቀናጀ ስራ ማከናወን 
- ተሽከርካሪዎች የድርጅቱን የጥገና ፖሊሲና የትራፊክ ደህንነት መመሪያዎችን ጠብቀው እንዲንቀሳቀሱ በኃላፊነት መከታተል
- የዕለታዊ፣ ሳምንታዊ እና ወርሃዊ ሪፖርቶችን ማዘጋጀት

title: Operator III
description:
12ኛ ክፍል  ያጠናቀቀ/ች አግባብነት ካለው የስራ ልምድ ጋር
ዋና ሃላፊነቶች፡
- ለመሬት ቁፋሮ፣ ለመቦርቦር፣ ለመጫን እና ለኋላ ለመሙላት የባክሆይ ጫኚን በብቃት መስራት
- ለመሠረት, ለቆሻሻ ማስወገጃ, ለቧንቧ መስመር እና ለመገልገያዎች መቆፈር
- እንደ አፈር፣ አሸዋ፣ ጠጠር እና ፍርስራሾች ያሉ ቁሳቁሶችን መጫን እና ማውረድ
- እንደ ጣቢያ መስፈርቶች ተገቢውን ደረጃ እና ደረጃዎችን ማረጋገጥ
- የጣቢያ ደህንነት ደንቦችን እና የትራፊክ አስተዳደር ዕቅዶችን መከተል
- ከጣቢያው ተቆጣጣሪዎች እና የመሬት ሰራተኞች ጋር በጋራ መስረት
- የሜካኒካዊ ጉዳዮችን ሪፖርት ማድረግ እና መሰረታዊ የመከላከያ ጥገናን ማከናወን
- የስራ ቦታዎች ንፁህ እና የተደራጁ ማድረግ

title: Driver I
description:
12ኛ ክፍል ያጠናቀቀ እና 3ተኛ ደረጃ መንጃ ፈቃድ ያለው አግባብነት ካለው የስራ ልምድ ጋር
ዋና ዋና ኃላፊነቶች 
- ተሽከርካሪን በጥንቃቄ መንዳት
- ከመጓጓዝ በፊትና በኋላ ተሽከርካሪ መመርመር
- የጭነት ሰነዶችን መሙላትና መያዝ
- ከሎጂስቲክስ እና ከቢሮ ጋር መግናኘት
- የመንገድ ደህንነት ህጎችን መከተል

title: Driver V
description:
12ተኛ ክፍል ያጠናቀቀ እና ልዩ መንጃ ፈቃድ ያለው  አግባብ ከሆነ የስራ ልምድ ጋር
ዋና ሃላፊነቶች
- አስቸኳይ ምርመራ እና አስተዳደር እንዲኖረው መንገዶችን በትክክል መከታተል እና የነዳጅ አጠቃቀም እንዲቀነስ ማድረግ።
- ከጉዞ በፊት እና ከጉዞ በኋላ መኪናዎችን መፈተሽ
- የጉዞ መዝገቦች፣ የትራንስፖርት መዝገቦች እና የነዳጅ ተመዝግቦችን ትክክለኛ ሁኔታ መጠበቅ።
- ሁሉንም የመንገድ ሕጎች፣ ደህንነት ደንቦች እና የድርጅቱን ፖሊሲዎች መከታተል።
- የተመደቡትን መኪናዎች ንፁህ እንዲሆኑ እና በትክክል እንዲጠበቁ ማረጋገጥ፡፡
- ከመጓጓዝ በፊትና በኋላ ተሽከርካሪ መመርመር
- የጭነት ሰነዶችን መሙላትና መያዝ
- ከሎጂስቲክስ እና ከቢሮ ጋር መግናኘት
- የመንገድ ደህንነት ህጎችን መከተል

title: Accountant
description:
Bachelor’s Degree in Accounting, Finance or with related field of study with relevant work experience
Duties and Responsibilities
- Prepare and maintain accurate financial records, including ledgers, journals, and supporting documentation
- Record daily financial transactions and ensure proper posting in accounting systems
- Prepare monthly, quarterly, and annual financial statements
- Reconcile bank statements and accounts to ensure accuracy
- Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable processes
- Process invoices, payments, and expense reports in a timely manner
- Ensure compliance with tax regulations and assist in tax filings

title: Sales Coordinator
description:
Bachelor’s Degree in Business, Management or with related field of study with relevant work experience
Duties and Responsibilities
- Support the sales team in daily administrative and operational tasks
- Coordinate sales activities, meetings, and schedules for the team
- Follow up with clients on inquiries, orders, and pending issues
- Process sales orders and ensure timely delivery coordination
- Prepare regular sales reports, summaries, and presentations
- Communicate with internal departments (logistics, finance, marketing) to ensure smooth operations
- Handle customer queries and provide basic product/service information

title: Sales Engineer
description:
Bachelor's Degree in Civil Engineering or with related field of study with relevant work experience
Duties and Responsibilities
- Promote and sell building construction products and services to clients
- Identify client requirements and recommend suitable technical solutions
- Prepare and deliver technical presentations and product explanations
- Review drawings, specifications, and project requirements
- Prepare quotations, cost estimates, and sales proposals
- Maintain strong relationships with contractors, consultants, and developers
- Conduct site visits to support clients and monitor project progress
- Coordinate with engineering, procurement, and project teams

title: Quality Assurance and Controlling Engineer
description:
Bachelor's degree in Civil Engineering.
Duties & Responsibilities:
- Monitor and ensure quality standards in construction projects.
- Conduct inspections and quality control assessments.
- Prepare and review technical reports and documentation.
- Ensure adherence to project specifications, codes, and safety regulations.
- Identify defects and recommend corrective actions.
- Assist in developing quality control procedures and guidelines.
- Track project progress and report any deviations from standards.
- Support audits and ensure proper implementation of quality systems.

title: Quality Control Officer
description:
Bachelor’s Degree in Chemistry, Industrial Chemistry, Cosmetic Science, Pharmacy, Chemical Engineering, or related fields.
Duties & Responsibilities:
- Inspect raw materials, in-process products, and finished cosmetics to ensure quality standards are met.
- Conduct quality tests including physical, chemical, and microbiological checks as required.
- Ensure compliance with cosmetics manufacturing standards and safety regulations.
- Monitor production processes to maintain consistency and product quality.
- Identify defects or deviations and report them with corrective actions.
- Maintain accurate documentation of quality control tests and reports.
- Work closely with production and R&D teams to improve product quality.
- Ensure proper storage and handling of raw materials and finished goods.

title: Elevator Technician
description:
Certification or Diploma in Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering or with related field of study
Duties and Responsibilities
- Install and commission elevator systems according to technical specifications
- Perform routine maintenance, servicing, and safety inspections
- Diagnose mechanical, electrical, and control system faults
- Repair or replace defective components (motors, cables, panels, sensors, etc.)
- Respond to emergency breakdowns and ensure quick resolution
- Test systems after installation or repair to ensure proper operation
- Maintain service logs, reports, and maintenance records
- Ensure compliance with safety regulations and company standards

title: Supply Chain and Logistics Officer
description:
Bachelor’s Degree in Supply Chain Management, Logistics, Business Administration, or related fields with relevant work experience. 
Duties & Responsibilities:
- Plan, implement, and monitor supply chain strategies to ensure efficient procurement, transportation, and distribution.
- Coordinate with suppliers, vendors, and internal teams for timely delivery of goods and services.
- Manage inventory levels and conduct regular stock audits.
- Negotiate with suppliers and logistics providers to optimize cost and service quality.
- Maintain accurate records of shipments, deliveries, and inventory.

title: Admin & Finance Officer
description:
Bachelor’s Degree in Accounting, Finance, Business Administration, Management, or related fields with relevant work experience.
Duties & Responsibilities:
- Manage daily administrative and financial operations of the office.
- Handle financial transactions, record keeping, and maintain accurate accounts.
- Prepare financial reports, budgets, and expense tracking.
- Manage office supplies, logistics, and general administrative tasks.
- Support payroll processing and staff-related administrative activities.

title: Junior HR Officer
description:
Bachelor’s Degree in Human Resource, Management or with related field of study with relevant work experience
Duties and Responsibilities
- Assist in the recruitment process
- Maintain and update employee records and HR databases
- Support on boarding and orientation of new employees
- Monitor employee attendance, leave records, and timesheets
- Respond to employee inquiries regarding HR policies and procedures
- Assist in organizing training sessions and staff development programs
- Ensure proper filing and confidentiality of employee records
- Support compliance with labor laws and company policies

title: Senior Technical Expert
description:
Bachelor's Degree in Electronics, Electrical Engineering, Audio, Visual Technology or in a related field of study with relevant work experience
Duties & Responsibilities:﻿
- Perform regular maintenance and troubleshooting of AV, lighting, staging, and media equipment
- Set up, test, and operate equipment during events and productions
- Diagnose and repair technical faults quickly and effectively
- Support technical planning for events in coordination with the production team
- Maintain equipment logs and update asset tracking systems
- Guide and support junior technicians on technical standards and safety
- Ensure compliance with operational, safety, and manufacturer guidelines
- Maintain equipment logs and update asset tracking systems

title: Sales and Marketing Officer
description:
Diploma or Bachelor’s Degree in Marketing, Business Administration, Management, or with related field of study with relevant work experience
Duties and Responsibilities
- Develop and implement effective sales and marketing strategies to increase company revenue
- Conduct market research to identify new business opportunities and customer segments
- Prepare and deliver professional sales presentations and company profiles to potential clients
- Plan and execute promotional campaigns to increase brand visibility and market share
- Maintain accurate records of sales activities, client interactions, and pipeline reports

title: Safaricom Brand Ambassador
description:
10ኛ እና ከዚያ በላይ ክፍል ያጠናቀቀ/ች አግባብ ከሆነ የስራ ልምድ ጋር
ዋና ሃላፊነቶች፡
- ለሳፋሪኮም አዳዲስ ደንበኞችን ማፍራት
- M-pesa አካውንቶችን አክቲቭ ማድረግ
- የሳፋሪኮም ምርቶችን ማስተዋወቅ
- የሽያጭ ግቦችን መድረስ እና ማሻሻል
- የገበያ መረጃ መሰብሰብ እና ሪፖርት ማድረግ
- በመስክ (field) ላይ የሽያጭ እና ማስተዋወቂያ ስራዎችን መፈጸም

title: Driver VI ( High Bed /Low Bed)
description:
10 ኛ ክፍል/12ተኛ ክፍል ያጠናቀቀ እና 5ተኛ ደረጃ መንጃ ፈቃድ ያለው አግባብ ከሆነ የስራ ልምድ ጋር
ዋና ዋና ሃላፊነቶች
- ተሽከርካሪን በጥንቃቄ መንዳት
- ጭነትን መጫን፣ መውረድና መጠንቀቅ
- ከመጓጓዝ በፊትና በኋላ ተሽከርካሪ መመርመር
- የጭነት ሰነዶችን መሙላትና መያዝ
- ከሎጂስቲክስ እና ከቢሮ ጋር መግናኘት
- የመንገድ ደህንነት ህጎችን መከተል
- ቀላል የመኪና ጥገና ማድረግ

title: Sales
description:
Minimum of a Diploma or TVET in Business, Marketing, Economics, Finance, or a related field with relevant work experience.
Duties & Responsibilities:
- Identify target market segments and qualify sales opportunities to achieve targets.
- Conduct outbound prospecting to generate leads and build a strong sales pipeline.
- Deliver product demonstrations and clearly communicate value to potential customers.
- Manage the full sales cycle from lead generation to closing deals.
- Address customer objections and successfully close sales.

title: Human Resources Officer
description:
Bachelor’s Degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, Management, or with related field of study with relevant work experience
Duties and Responsibilities
- Support recruitment activities such as job postings and interview coordination
- Assist with employee onboarding and documentation
- Maintain employee records and HR databases
- Support employee communication and HR-related inquiries
- Help ensure company policies and procedures are followed

title: Security Guard
description:
8ኛ/9ኛ/10ኛ ክፍል ያጠናቀቀ/ች እና የውትድርና ስልጠና የወሰደ/ች አግባብነት ካለው የስራ ልምድ ጋር
ዋና ዋና ኃላፊነቶች
- የኩባንያውን ግቢ እና ንብረት ደህንነት ማረጋገጥ
- ያልተፈቀደ አካልን ከመግባት መከልከል
- በተቋሙ ውስጥ ለሚፈጠሩ አደጋዎች አፋጣኝ ምላሽ መስጠት እና ተገቢው እርምጃ መወሰዱን ማረጋገጥ
- የሕንፃውን መዳረሻ መቆጣጠር
- የተቋሙ ንብረቶች እንዳይሰረቁ፣ እንዳይባክኑ ወይም ሆን ተብሎ ጉዳት እንዳይደርስባቸው ጥብቅ ጥበቃ ማድረግ
- በተቋሙ ውስጥ የተቀመጡ የደህንነት ህጎች እና መመሪያዎች በሁሉም ሰው መከበራቸውን ማረጋገጥ እና አጠራጣሪ እንቅስቃሴዎችን ሪፖርት
- የፋብሪካ የሰራተኛ መግቢያ እና መውጫ ሰዓት መከታተል
- በስራ ሰዓት ያጋጠሙ ልዩ ሁኔታዎችን፣ የተስተዋሉ ለውጦችን እና የዕለቱን የጥበቃ ውሎ በዝርዝር መዝግቦ ለኃላፊ ማቅረብ

title: Lab Technician
description:
Bachelor’s Degree or Diploma in Chemistry, Industrial Chemistry, Chemical Engineering  or related fields with relevant work experience.
Duties & Responsibilities:
- Conduct laboratory tests on raw materials, in-process samples, and finished liquid products.
- Monitor quality parameters throughout the liquid processing line.
- Ensure products meet required specifications and quality standards.
- Record and analyze test results and maintain accurate lab documentation.
- Identify and report deviations or quality issues.
- Support production teams to maintain consistency and quality.
- Ensure proper handling, storage, and usage of laboratory equipment and chemicals.

title: PME Officer
description:
Bachelor’s degree in Statistics, Development Studies, Economics, Social Sciences, or With related field of study 
Duties & Responsibilities:
- Develop and implement PME frameworks aligned with project log frames and indicators 
- Lead baseline, midline, and end line assessments 
- Ensure regular data collection, verification, and quality assurance 
- Track progress against indicators (e.g., awareness levels, behaviour change, service uptake) 
- Prepare high-quality reports for donors 
- Support project teams in planning and adaptive management 
- Build staff capacity on M&E tools and systems 
- Ensure integration of gender, GBV, and safeguarding indicators 
- Document lessons learned and best practices

title: Field Sales Officer
description:
Bachelor's Degree in Engineering, Business Administration or in a related field of study with relevant work experience
Duties & Responsibilities:
- Identify, target, and pursue new sales opportunities at active project sites within your assigned territory.
- Develop and maintain strong, long-term relationships with contractors, engineers, project managers, and other key stakeholders.
- Conduct compelling product demonstrations and present tailored technical-commercial solutions that address specific project requirements.
- Prepare and submit customized proposals in coordination with our internal technical teams.
Required Skills & Competencies:
- Ability to understand technical drawings, specifications, and construction processes. Knowledge of relevant industry materials or equipment is a strong advantage.
- Excellent negotiation, presentation, and closing abilities.
- A natural talent for building rapport and trust with a diverse clientele.

title: Real Estate Sales Supervisor
description:
Bachelor’s  Degree in Marketing Management, Engineering, Business Management or with related field of study with relevant work experience.
Duties & Responsibilities:
- Supervise, coach, and motivate real estate sales agents
- Set monthly and quarterly sales targets and monitor performance
- Conduct regular sales meetings, training, and performance reviews
- Ensure compliance with company sales policies and procedures
- Oversee day-to-day sales activities for residential and/or commercial properties
- Monitor lead allocation, follow-up, and closing activities

title: Mid-level Business Analyst
description:
Bachelor's Degree in Business, Computer Science, or with related field of study with relevant work experience
Duties and Responsibilities

- Gather and document business requirements using interviews, workshops, surveys, and other techniques.
- Analyze business requirements and design functional specifications to meet business needs.
- Create process maps, use cases, and other documentation to support project and system development.
- Collaborate with development and QA teams to ensure that project requirements are properly understood and implemented.

title: Accountant
description:
Bachelor’s Degree in Accounting, Finance or in a related field of study with relevant work experience
Duties and Responsibilities:
- Maintain and update financial records, including ledgers, journals, and invoices.
- Manage the company’s cash flow and ensure timely processing of payments and receipts.
- Prepare and monitor budgets, financial forecasts, and variance analysis.
- Support the preparation of financial statements and reports (e.g., balance sheets, income statements, cash flow statements).
- Assist in the coordination and preparation of internal and external audits.
- Ensure compliance with tax regulations and prepare tax returns.

title: Import and Export Officer
description:
Bachelor's Degree in Business Management, Management, Logistics, Supply Chain Management, or with related field of study with relevant work experience
Duties & Responsibilities
- Prepare, review, and process export documentation, including commercial invoices, packing lists, certificates of origin, contracts, shipping instructions, and related trade documents
- Ensure all export documents comply with buyer requirements, international trade standards, and applicable Ethiopian regulations
- Follow up on vessel schedules, bookings, cargo readiness, and shipment confirmations
- Handle all documentation related to ECX, NBE, Customs Commission, and other regulatory bodies
- Maintain complete, accurate, and well-organized export records and filing systems

title: Junior Accountant
description:

title: Call Receptionist

Degree or Diploma in Business Administration, Management, or any related field with related work experience.

process and contract negotiations.

- Assist in brainstorming sessions and contribute creative ideas for marketing campaigns

Development Partner-Funded Programs:-Lead or support delivery of donor-funded public sector reform programs,Engage with multilateral and bilateral development partners on technical assistance projects,Ensure compliance with donor requirements, reporting standards, and procurement frameworks,Support implementation of large-scale reform and capacity-building initiatives
Project Leadership & Delivery:-Manage end-to-end delivery of complex advisory engagements,Oversee project teams including Managers, Consultants, and Analysts,Ensure quality, timeliness, and strategic relevance of all deliverables,Lead work planning, risk management, and stakeholder coordination.

title: Junior Site /Office/ Engineer
description: The Junior Site/Office Engineer will support construction projects by coordinating on-site activities, preparing reports and ensuring compliance with engineering standards. Candidates should hold a Master's Degree or Bachelor's Degree in civil engineering or construction management.

title: Senior Medical Laboratory Technician
description: የመጀመሪያ ዲግሪ ወይም ሁለተኛ ዲግሪ ወይም ፒኤችዲ በሜዲካል ላቦራቶሪ ቴክኖሎጂ ወይም በተመሳሳይ የትምሀርት መስክ የተመረቀ/ቀች አግባብነት ካለው የስራ ልምድ ጋር

title: Administration and Finance
description: The position requires a Bachelor’s degree in Management, Economics or Accounting and at least five years of general work experience, including two years in a similar role. Candidates must be able to handle financial administration tasks for the Bonga Project.

title: Senior Accountant
description: The position requires a Bachelor of Arts in Accounting & Finance and at least four years of professional experience. Applicants must submit a non-returnable CV, application letter, and copies of credentials within ten days of posting. Shortlisted candidates will be contacted for further steps.

title: Security Guard
description: The position requires completion of 8th grade and basic military training, with two years of work experience. Candidates must possess physical fitness, the ability to disassemble and assemble weapons, and knowledge of security systems and emergency procedures. Responsibilities include monitoring access points, ensuring proper vehicle and personnel screening, maintaining premises security.

title: HR Section Head
description: The position requires a Bachelor’s degree in Management, Human Resources Management or related field (or diploma with substantial experience). Candidates must have at least three to four years of HR experience, preferably in construction or manufacturing. Proficiency in English is mandatory and fluency in Oromifa is highly preferred.

title: Coffee Plant Manager
description: The role requires a BA or BSc in Management, Electrical/Mechanical Engineering, or related fields with at least five years of experience managing coffee plants. Candidates must provide a CV, application letter and credential copies within ten days for consideration.

title: Export Operations Officer (Coffee)
description: This position requires a BA degree in a relevant field and at least two years of experience in coffee export. Candidates must submit a non-returnable CV, application letter and copies of credentials within ten days to the specified office location in Addis Ababa.

title: Office Machine Technician
description: This position requires a Certificate in office machine maintenance, preferably with a background in Computer Science or IT. Candidates must possess at least two years of related work experience and a willingness to provide both original and copy of their educational documents.

title: Senior Hydraulic Engineer
description:
የመጀመሪያ ዲግሪ ወይም ሁለተኛ ዲግሪ ወይም ፒኤችዲ በሃይድሮሎጂ፣ ሀይድሮሊክ ኢንጅነሪንግ ወይም በተመሳሳይ የትምሀርት መስክ የተመረቀ/ቀች አግባብነት ካለው የስራ ልምድ 
ዋና ዋና ኃላፊነቶች
- የተለያዩ የሃይድሮሊክ ዲዛይኖችን በጥራት ማዘጋጀት
- የሃይድሮሊክ መዋቅሮች በታቀደው ዲዛይን እና ደረጃ መሠረት መገንባታቸውን በአካል ተገኝቶ መቆጣጠር
- ዝርዝር የቴክኒክ ሰነዶችን እና የሥራ ዝርዝር መግለጫዎችን (Specifications) ማዘጋጀት
- በሳይት ላይ የሚከናወኑ የየዕለቱ የሃይድሮሊክ ስራዎችን በየቀኑ መመዝገብ
- በከፍተኛ መሃንዲሶች የሚሰጡ ስራዎችን ማከናወን
- የሥራ ቦታ ደህንነት መመሪያዎችን እና የአካባቢ ጥበቃ ደንቦችን አክብሮ መስራት
- ከፕሮጀክት ቡድን አባላት እና ከሚመለከታቸው ባለሙያዎች ጋር በቅንጅት መስራት

title: Senior Accountant
description: The role requires Bachelor's Degree (B.A Degree) in accounting. Minimum of 5 years of relevant work experience.

title: Insurance Officer
description: የመጀመሪያ ዲግሪ ወይም ሁለተኛ ዲግሪ ወይም ፒኤችዲ በባንኪንግ ኤንድ ኢንሹራንስ፣ አካውንቲንግ፣ ኢኮኖሚክስ፣ ቢዝነስ አድምንስትሬሽን፣ ማኔጅመንት፣ ቢዝነስ ማኔጅመንት፣ ፐርቼዚንግ ማኔጅመንት ወይም በተመሳሳይ የትምሀርት መስክ የተመረቀ/ቀች አግባብነት ካለው የስራ ልምድ ጋር

title: pickup driver
description: The Pikap Driver position requires a minimum of eighth‑grade education and at least two years of driving experience. Candidates must hold a valid driver’s license, possess good physical stamina for loading/unloading cargo, and demonstrate basic Amharic communication skills. The role involves operating the company’s Pikap vehicle safely, providing courteous customer service, managing routes efficiently, maintaining vehicle condition, and keeping accurate records. Successful applicants will receive a monthly salary of 16,000 ETB, with potential performance bonuses and additional benefits such as fuel allowance and health insurance.

title: Senior Store Keeper/Warehouse Supervisor
description: Candidates must hold a Diploma or Degree in Logistics, Supply Chain, or a related field and have at least three years of relevant experience. The role requires strong organizational skills, attention to detail, and the ability to coordinate with multiple stakeholders.

title: Senior Contract Engineer
description: A senior contract engineer role at At-Con Engineering & Architecture Consultancy Plc. requires a bachelor’s degree in civil engineering or related field, with a master’s degree considered advantageous. The position involves overseeing construction contracts, managing claims and variations, ensuring compliance with FIDIC conditions, and coordinating with stakeholders. Candidates must be proficient in MS Office, AutoCAD, and contract management software, possess strong analytical and communication skills, and have 8–10 years of relevant experience.

title: Database Administrator
description: የመጀመሪያ ዲግሪ ወይም ሁለተኛ ዲግሪ በኮሚዩኒኬሽን ኢንጅነሪንግ፣ ኮሚዩኒኬሽን ኢንጅነሪንግ ኤንድ ኔትወርኪንግ፣ ኢንፎርሜሽን ሲስተም፣ ሳይበር ሴኩሪቲ፣ ኢንፎርሜሽን ሲስተምስ፣ ኮምፒዩተር ሳይንስ፣ ኢንፎርሜሽን ኮሚኒኬሽን ቴክኖሎጂ፣ ኮምፒዩተር ኢንጅነሪንግ፣ ሶፍትዌር ኢንጂነሪንግ፣ ኤሌክትሪካል ኢንጅነሪንግ፣ ኢንፎርሜሽን ቴክኖሎጂ፣ ማኔጅመንት ኢንፎርሜሽን ሲስተም፣ ኔትወርክ ኢንጅነሪንግ  ወይም በተመሳሳይ የትምሀርት መስክ የተመረቀ/ቀች አግባብነት ካለው የስራ ልምድ ጋር

title: Office Engineer
description: The Office Engineer role requires a Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering, Construction Operations and Technology Management (COTM), or an equivalent field, along with a PE III license or comparable certification. Candidates must have at least eight years of general work experience, including four years in a similar position.

title: Vehicle Dispatch and Monitoring Staff II
description:
ደረጃ 1/2/3/4 በማኔጅመንት፣ አውቶ መካኒክ ወይም በተመሳሳይ የትምሀርት መስክ የተመረቀ/ቀች አግባብነት ካለው የስራ ልምድ ጋር
ዋና ዋና ኃላፊነቶች
-  የተቋሙን የዕለት ተዕለት የተሽከርካሪ ስምሪት ዕቅድ ማዘጋጀት እና ተሽከርካሪዎች በተገቢው ሰዓትና ቦታ እንዲሰማሩ ማድረግ
- የተሽከርካሪዎችን የሥራ ሰዓት፣ የተጓዙበትን ርቀት (K.M) እና የነዳጅ ፍጆታን በየቀኑ መመዝገብና መቆጣጠር
- የጂ.ፒ.ኤስ (GPS) መከታተያ መሣሪያዎችን በመጠቀም የተሽከርካሪዎችን እንቅስቃሴ በቅርብ መከታተል እና ከተፈቀደላቸው መስመር ውጭ እንዳይወጡ መቆጣጠር
- የተሽከርካሪዎችን የጥገና እና የሰርቪስ ጊዜ በመከታተል በሰዓቱ ጥገና እንዲደረግላቸው ለሚመለከተው ክፍል ማሳወቅ

title: Risk and Legal Consultant
description:
Grant Thornton Ethiopia seeks a highly motivated Risk and Legal Consultant to support internal risk management, compliance, and external client advisory services. The role requires a Bachelor’s degree in Law (LLB) with preference for a Master’s or professional certification. Candidates must bring 3–7 years of experience in legal advisory, corporate services, or risk & compliance, including knowledge of company secretarial work and regulatory liaison.

The consultant will ensure adherence to internal policies, perform conflict checks, manage compliance documentation, and provide guidance on ethics and data protection. Additionally, they will deliver legal advice on commercial matters, draft contracts, conduct due diligence, and support mergers, acquisitions, and business transactions.

Responsibilities also include managing company registrations, licenses, and statutory records, advising on corporate governance best practices, and fostering a risk-aware culture across the organization. The role involves client relationship management, business development, and leading junior team members.

Grant Thornton offers a dynamic professional environment with opportunities for career growth, exposure to diverse industries, competitive compensation, and performance-based incentives.

title: General Manager
description: The role requires a Bachelor’s degree in Business Management, Administration or related field and focuses on overseeing operations within a pharmaceutical import company. Candidates must demonstrate proven experience as a General Manager, strong leadership abilities, and comprehensive knowledge of Ethiopian pharmaceutical regulations and supply chain systems.

title: Senior Environment Specialist
description: የመጀመሪያ ዲግሪ ወይም ሁለተኛ ዲግሪ ወይም ፒኤችዲ በኢንቫይሮመንታል ጂኦ ሳይንስ፣ ኢንቫይሮመንታል ሳይንስ፣ ኢንቫይሮመንታል ጂኦሎጂ ኤንድ ጂኦ- ሀዛርድ፣ ክላይሜት ቼንጅ ኤንድ ዳቨሎፕመንት፣ ጂኦግራፊ ኤንድ ኢንቫይሮመንታል ስተዲ፣ ሶሽዮ ኢኮኖሚክስ ዴቨሎፕመንት ፕላኒንግ ኤንድ ኢንቫይሮመንት፣ ክላይሜት ቼንጅ ኤንድ ዲዛስተር ሪስክ ማኔጅመንት፣ ኢንቫሮመንታል ፕሮቴክሽን፣ ጂኦ ኢንቫይሮንመንታል ሳይንስ፣ አፕላይድ ክላይሜት ሳይንስና ክላይሜት አፌየርስ፣ ክላይሜት ኤንድ ሶሳይቲ፣ ዲዛዝተር ሪስክ ማኔጅመንት ኢንቫይሮመንታል ኤንድ ኦኮፔሽናል ሄልዝ ኤንድ ሴፍቲ፣ ኢንቫሮመንታል ሄልዝ ሳይንስ፣ ባዮሎጂ ወይም በተመሳሳይ የትምሀርት መስክ የተመረቀ/ቀች አግባብነት ካለው የስራ ልምድ ጋር

title: Construction Forman
description: The position requires a TVET Diploma in Construction and at least six years of general construction experience, including four years in a supervisory role. Candidates must be able to lead site crews, enforce safety protocols, manage resources, and produce accurate progress reports for the Bonga Project.

title: Project Manager (Road )(Vacancy Code- Building 009/2026)
description: This role requires a Civil Engineering graduate (M.Sc. or B.Sc.) with at least seven years of experience, including two as a project manager in road construction. The successful candidate should have international exposure or proven success managing end-to-end road projects, particularly asphalt roads and bridges, with extensive practical experience.

title: Secretary
description: The position requires a Bachelor's degree Diploma or TVET Level IV qualification in Secretarial Science or related fields. Candidates must possess 2 to 4 years of relevant experience and be able to submit their CV and supporting documents within the specified timeframe.

title: Electrician I
description: The position requires a Diploma from TVET in Building Electrical Works or related fields and at least four years of experience. Candidates will be responsible for installing, maintaining, and troubleshooting electrical systems on projects outside Addis Ababa. The role demands adherence to safety standards and coordination with project teams.

title: Workshop Supervisor
description: First degree (Bachelor’s Degree) from a recognized university/college in Automotive Engineering, Agricultural Engineering, Automotive Technology, Mechanical Engineering, or other related fields of study with 4 years of relevant work experience, out of which 1 year in a supervisory or senior expert position.

title: Supply Chain Officer
description: The role requires a degree in Logistics or Supply Chain Management and at least two years of experience managing supply chain activities, including procurement, stock, freight, and database administration. Candidates must be proficient in English; knowledge of Afan Oromo and Amharic is highly desirable. Essential computer skills (Word, Excel, internet) are required.

title: Architect
description: The position requires a Master's Degree or Bachelor's Degree in Architecture with at least four years of relevant experience, including two years specifically on interior‑related projects. Candidates must bring their CV, application letter and supporting documents to the head office for consideration.

title: Electrical Engineer
description: The Electrical Engineer role requires a Bachelor's degree or higher in Sanitary Engineering or a related field. Candidates must have at least three years of experience designing and reviewing electrical systems. Applicants should provide copies of their CV, credentials, testimonies, and an updated professional license to strengthen their application.

title: Senior Pavement/Material Engineer
description:
የመጀመሪያ ዲግሪ ወይም ሁለተኛ ዲግሪ ወይም ፒኤችዲ በማቴሪያልስ ኢንጅነሪንግ፣ ጂኦ ቴክኒካል ኢንጅነሪንግ፣ ሮድ ኤንድ ትራንስፖርት ኢንጅነሪንግ፣ ሀይ ዌይ ኢንጅነሪንግ ፣ሲቪል ምህንድስና ፣ ኮንስትራክሽን ቴክኖሎጂ ወይም በተመሳሳይ የትምሀርት መስክ የተመረቀ/ቀች አግባብነት ካለው የስራ ልምድ ጋር
ዋና ዋና ኃላፊነቶች
- የመንገድ ሁኔታን በየጊዜው በመገምገም ተገቢውን የጥገና ወይም የማጠናከሪያ የሥራ ዕቅድ ማዘጋጀት
- ለግንባታ የሚውሉ ግብዓቶች ተገቢውን የላቦራቶሪ ምርመራ ማድረጋቸውንና የጥራት ደረጃቸውን መጠበቃቸውን ማረጋገጥ
- የግንባታ ሂደቱ በጸደቀው ዲዛይን፣ የቴክኒክ ስፔስፊኬሽን እና የጥራት መመሪያ መሠረት መከናወኑን በቦታው ተገኝቶ መቆጣጠር
- በግንባታ ቦታ ላይ የደህንነት መመሪያዎችና የአካባቢ ጥበቃ ደንቦች መከበራቸውን ማረጋገጥ

title: Plumber II
description: The position requires a Diploma/TVET Level IV in Plumbing or related fields, with at least six years of practical experience. Candidates must submit a comprehensive CV and supporting certificates in PDF format via email or deliver them personally to the specified Addis Ababa location. The role focuses on plumbing installation, maintenance, and repair across project sites outside Addis.

description: Candidates must hold a Degree or diploma in Marketing, Management, Supply Chain Management, Procurement, Business Administration, Engineering, or a related field, with proven experience managing procurement for infrastructure, buildings, or industrial projects. The role requires deep knowledge of construction materials, contract negotiation, vendor management, and ERP systems, coupled with strong leadership, communication, and analytical skills.

title: Equipment Administration officer
description: The role requires a Bachelor's degree in Mechanical Engineering or related fields and at least four years of relevant experience. Candidates should provide a comprehensive CV, educational certificates, and work experience documents. The position is based outside Addis Ababa and involves equipment administration responsibilities.

title: Senior Legal Officer
description: The position of Senior Legal Officer requires a qualified legal professional holding an LLM or LLB degree. Candidates must possess extensive experience—minimum 8 years for LLM holders or 10 years for LLB holders—in relevant legal practice, with court experience preferred. The role is based in Addis Ababa and offers negotiable compensation.

title: Medical Laboratory Technician III
description: ደረጃ 1/2/3/4 በሜዲካል ላቦራቶሪ ወይም በተመሳሳይ የትምሀርት መስክ የተመረቀ/ቀች አግባብነት ካለው የስራ ልምድ ጋር

title: Architect

Candidates must be able to prepare architectural designs, coordinate with other disciplines, and produce drawings, 3‑D models, and presentations. A renewed professional license and supporting documentation are mandatory for consideration.

Candidates must have extensive experience (8–10+ years) in market research, sales, business intelligence, international trade, logistics, import/export operations or related roles. The position offers a negotiable and attractive salary and is based in Addis Ababa.

Candidates must bring detailed project documentation and a current CV demonstrating relevant expertise. The position offers competitive compensation aligned with the company's salary scale.

title: Sr. Accountant

Responsibilities include registering all revenue and expenses, handling taxation matters, and processing staff payroll accurately. Candidates must hold a BA in Accounting or Finance and have at least two years of relevant professional experience.

title: Head Pharmacist
description: Bachelor’s degree in Pharmacy is required, along with five years of professional experience, including at least two years in a supervisory role. A specialist background in pharmaceutical retail and a valid professional license are mandatory.

The candidate must possess 2 to 4 years of relevant experience in civil engineering projects and be able to support project operations outside Addis Ababa.

title: Draft man

Candidates must hold a Diploma or higher in Drafting Technology and possess strong attention to detail for accurate drawings. Applicants should submit only a copy of their CV, credentials, testimonies, and an updated professional license.

Candidates must possess strong technical knowledge of pipe sizing, pressure calculations, venting systems, and modern sanitary fixtures, as well as proven leadership and communication skills.

description: The Sanitary Engineer role is based at the head office in Addis Ababa and requires a Bachelor of Science or higher in Sanitary Engineering or a related field. Candidates must hold a renewed professional license and bring a minimum of two years’ experience in designing, reviewing, and preparing documentation for sanitary systems.

title: Health Officer
description: The candidates must hold a Bachelor's degree in Public Health or related field of study with relevant work experience. At least 2 years’ experience as Health officer

description: The role involves delivering engaging English lessons to students of all ages and proficiency levels, both in classroom and online settings. Responsibilities include lesson planning, assessment, feedback, record‑keeping, and participation in professional development. The position requires strong command of English, excellent communication skills, and the ability to adapt teaching methods for diverse learners.

description: The position of Field Coordinator at Orbis International Ethiopia requires an Master's Degree or Bachelor's Degree  in Public Health, Ophthalmology or a related health field with at least four years of experience, including one year in eye‑care program implementation and service delivery.

title: IT Systems and Support Manager
description: The candidates must hold a Bachelor's degree in Computer science, Software Engineering, Information System or in a related field of study with relevant work experience.

title: Junior Customer Service Officer
description: The position requires a Bachelor's or TVET Level IV/III in Accounting, Economics, Management, Business Administration, or related fields. Candidates must have 1–3 years of relevant work experience and be able to submit their application and CV within the specified timeframe.

title: Accountant

The role requires strong analytical skills, integrity, and the ability to work independently while supporting audits and financial reporting.

Candidates should have a strong track record of peer‑reviewed publications, funded research projects, and experience managing research programs, budgets, and strategic partnerships.

Candidates should hold a Master’s degree in Health Economics, Health Financing, Business Administration or related fields, and possess over ten years of senior-level experience in health financing, systems strengthening, or large-scale program leadership. The role demands strategic oversight, resource mobilization, partnership development with government and donors, operational excellence, and the advancement of MSIE’s transition to a financially sustainable social enterprise model.

title: Construction Head
description: This role requires a graduate with an MSC or BSC in Civil Engineering, COTM or related fields and 6–8 years of construction experience. The successful candidate will lead construction projects, ensuring compliance with standards and efficient resource management.

description: The role requires a Bachelor’s degree in Accounting or Finance, ACCA finalist or professional level, and optionally CPA certification. Candidates must possess 6–8 years of experience in financial reporting within banks, audit firms, or large organizations.

title: Accountant
description: The role requires a Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or a related field. Strong proficiency in Microsoft Excel and accounting software. Good command of Microsoft Office Suite (Word, Excel, Access, Publisher, Outlook, PowerPoint)

description: This role requires a Bachelor's degree in Accounting, Finance, Management, Economics, Business Administration or related fields. The candidate must bring at least eight years of progressive experience with a minimum of two years as a Branch Manager.

The role requires proven leadership and team‑management skills, the ability to plan and execute preventive maintenance programs, and excellent problem‑solving and communication abilities.

This position requires a BA/BSc degree in Accounting, Finance or a related field and at least two years of relevant work experience. The role is based at the company’s head office located in Bole, near the former Brass Hospital, where the candidate will be responsible for share management activities.

Candidates must submit a non-returnable application, CV, and copies of supporting documents within seven working days from the announcement date. Applications can be delivered either in person or by post to the HR Administration & Development Department.

The successful applicant will work under permanent terms of employment with compensation according to the company’s salary scale and other benefit packages.

Candidates must possess strong product knowledge, marketing and sales skills, and be proficient in banking systems such as Core banking.

Candidates must possess strong communication and negotiation skills, be comfortable with prospecting, client meetings, property viewings, and closing deals.

description: The role requires a Ability to speak, read, and write Chinese fluently is mandatory. Good communication skills, able to work in a fast-paced environment. Candidate must be able to start immediately.

description: The role requires a Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field. Minimum 5 years of progressive accounting experience, including supervision of junior staff.

Hybrid Designs PLC/RIDE is a mobility technology company seeking a Junior Booking Agent for its call center. The role requires a Diploma or Degree in Customer Service, Business Administration, Marketing, Tourism, Hotel Management, or related fields and strong communication skills.

Candidates must be able to type at 25–35 words per minute and use basic computer applications such as MS Office and smartphone apps. They should also be familiar with reservation systems, data entry, and call logging.

Applicants should live in Addis Ababa neighborhoods including Denbel, Hayahulet, Megenagna, Wello Sefer, Agona, Kera, Gofa, Addis Gebeya, Mexico, Lideta, Shola, Ferencay, Lamberet, or Bole and be ready to start immediately.

The position offers a clear path to senior engineering and leadership roles as the company expands its physical presence, with responsibilities that span panel design, vendor negotiations, virtual environment management, and on‑site testing and commissioning.

The role requires operating and maintaining auxiliary machinery on a pipe production line. Candidates must hold a TVET Diploma or Level III/IV certification in General Mechanics, Manufacturing Technology, Electricity, or a related technical field. They should have at least one year of experience in manufacturing or pipe production environments.

Key responsibilities include blending raw PVC powder with chemicals, crushing scrap pipes, and ensuring continuous material supply to mainline extruders. The operator must monitor cooling systems, compressors, and loaders, maintain cleanliness, and perform basic maintenance tasks such as lubrication and filter cleaning.

Safety compliance is essential, especially when working near blades or heavy moving parts. Additional assignments may be given by the manager or supervisor.

Candidates must be fluent in Tigrinya and English, possess excellent communication abilities, and demonstrate commitment to social justice and community development.

The officer will design and deliver inclusive, gender‑sensitive trainings, conduct capacity assessments, and develop resource materials for CSOs.  They will also monitor and evaluate interventions, share best practices, and foster collaborations among CSOs, government, donors, and private actors.  The position offers a competitive salary in EURO and comprehensive benefits, with frequent travel across Ethiopia.

The role requires maintaining accurate asset registers, conducting audits, and coordinating procurement requests. title: Purchase / Procurement Officer
description: A Bachelor’s degree is required for this procurement role. The successful candidate will be responsible for establishing and standardizing procurement processes across the company, managing end‑to‑end purchasing activities, maintaining supplier databases, monitoring inventory levels, and ensuring cost efficiency while complying with company policies.

title: Senior Accountant (Tax, Compliance & Cost Focus)
description: A Bachelor’s degree in Accounting or Finance (MBA preferred) and CPA/ACCA certification are required, along with strong analytical and communication skills. The role supports strategic decision‑making within a healthcare setting by strengthening internal controls, enhancing cost management, and driving process improvements

title: Senior Accountant
description: The Senior Accountant position at Vamos Trading plc requires a Master's Degree or Bachelor's Degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field and a minimum of four years’ experience in accounting with at least one year in a senior or supervisory role.

title: Property Officer
description: The Property Officer will oversee the organization’s property portfolio, ensuring assets are maintained, legal requirements met, and tenant relationships positive. Candidates should hold a Diploma or BA in marketing, management, accounting or related field with at least 4 years of relevant experience. Responsibilities include rent collection, maintenance coordination, lease negotiations, record keeping and reporting.

title: The Bid Officer
description: Candidates should hold a Diploma or Bachelor's degree in Business Administration, Supply Chain Management, Accounting, or a related field. The position requires at least two years of experience in public procurement or related areas, with proficiency in Microsoft Office and eGP considered advantageous.

title: Office Machine Maintenance Technician
description: The role requires a Diploma, TVET Level IV, or certificate in Electronics, IT, Computer Science, or related fields. Candidates must have 2‑4 years of experience and be able to work independently or as part of a team.

title: Junior Liaison Officer
description: The Junior Liaison Officer is responsible for managing external relations, government documentation, and administrative coordination. The role requires a Diploma or Bachelor's degree in Management, Logistics, Supplies Management, Accounting, or related fields and at least two years of relevant experience.

title: HR Officer
description: This position requires a Master's Degree or Bachelor's Degree in Human Resource Management or a related field and at least two to four years of HR experience. The successful candidate will manage recruitment, employee relations, performance management, training, compliance with Ethiopian labor laws, payroll assistance, and HRIS administration for Vamos Addis.

title: Accountant
description: The accountant will support financial operations by maintaining accurate records, performing reconciliations, preparing statements and reports, ensuring compliance with regulations such as IFRS/GAAP, assisting in audits, managing accounts payable/receivable, supporting budgeting, reducing costs, handling payroll and expense claims, and improving accounting processes.

title: Junior Accountant
description: Candidates must hold a Diploma or Bachelor's degree in Accounting, Finance, or a related field, with strong skills in Microsoft Excel, Word, and Peachtree. The role involves processing payments via bank transfer, check, and Tele Birr, managing petty cash, preparing vouchers, and filing supporting documents.

title: Store Keeper
description: The Store Keeper role requires a Diploma or Bachelor's degree in Business Administration, Supply Chain Management, Accounting, or a related field. Candidates must have at least four years of experience managing warehouse operations and be proficient with Microsoft Office. Key responsibilities include maintaining accurate inventory records via Bin Cards or ERP systems, conducting regular stock counts, inspecting incoming materials against purchase orders, and ensuring proper storage and safety conditions.

title: GENERAL MANAGER (GM)
description:
Bilcor Institute of Leadership, Coaching and Research is recruiting a General Manager to lead operations for a growing real‑estate company in Addis Ababa. The role demands a strong strategic vision, operational execution, and cross‑functional coordination across HR, marketing, finance, and construction.
The candidate must hold at least a bachelor’s degree (MBA preferred) and bring 7+ years of leadership experience, including 3–5 years at senior level. Experience in real estate or construction is highly desirable.
This position offers a competitive executive package with performance‑based incentives and an influential role within the organization.

title: Junior Purchaser
description: Candidates should hold a Diploma or Bachelor's degree in Business Administration, Supply Chain Management, Accounting, or a related field, with at least two years of relevant experience. The position requires strong analytical skills, attention to detail, and the ability to collaborate with internal departments.

title: Junior Architect
description: Candidates should hold a Bachelor’s degree (or equivalent) in Architectural Engineering and possess less than five years of relevant experience, with an emphasis on projects involving offices, hospitals, and banks. Applicants are expected to demonstrate proficiency in architectural design software such as AutoCAD, Revit, SketchUp, and Adobe Creative Suite, along with strong visualization, drawing, and presentation skills.

title: Secretary Cashier
description: The role requires a Diploma or Bachelor's degree in Accounting, Management, Business Administration or related field, with at least two years of experience in a similar position, proficiency in Microsoft Office and accounting software such as Peachtree, and practical knowledge of operating a cash register machine.

title: Senior Electrical Design Engineer
description: Candidates should hold a Master's Degree or Bachelor's Degree in Electrical Engineering, possess a PPEE certificate, and demonstrate proficiency in both power system and weak current design. Key responsibilities include designing power supply and distribution systems, IT network systems, data centers, and Building Management Systems (BMS), preparing detailed CAD drawings, coordinating with other disciplines, and mentoring junior engineers.

title: Mechanical  Engineer
description: The position is for a Mechanical Engineer with a Master's Degree or Bachelor's Degree in Mechanical Engineering, required to have at least five years of relevant work experience. The candidate must be professionally registered with the institute and familiar with Ethiopian design standards.

title: Senior Architect
description: Candidates must hold a Bachelor’s Degree or equivalent in Architectural Engineering and possess extensive experience designing offices, hospitals, banks, and similar projects. The role focuses on preparing detailed architectural drawings, BOQs, and construction documentation while ensuring compliance with Ethiopian building codes. Proficiency in AutoCAD, Revit, SketchUp, Adobe Creative Suite, and strong visualization skills are required.

title: Front Desk Coordinator
description: This role requires a Bachelor’s degree and prior experience as a receptionist or customer service professional, preferably in real estate. The coordinator will serve as the first point of contact, managing visitor greetings, phone inquiries, and correspondence while maintaining organized filing systems. Responsibilities also include coordinating appointments, meetings, travel arrangements, office supplies, and event support to ensure efficient front‑office operations.

title: Head Nurse ( Pediatrics , NICU & GYN /Midwifery)
description:
The Head Nurse role at New Leaf Medical Complex PLC leads nursing services across Pediatrics, NICU, and GYN/Midwifery units. Candidates must hold a BSc or MSc in Nursing with a preference for specialties in pediatrics, neonatal care, or midwifery, and possess a valid professional nursing license. The position requires strong leadership, team management, and decision‑making skills, alongside excellent communication abilities.

Applicants should demonstrate high professionalism, empathy, and the capacity to work under pressure while maintaining patient safety standards and infection control protocols. A minimum of five years’ clinical experience, including supervisory duties, is essential for effective unit oversight and quality improvement initiatives.

Successful candidates will develop staffing rosters, conduct performance evaluations, coordinate with physicians, and lead continuous professional development programs. They will also serve as a liaison between nursing staff, management, and patients, ensuring high‑quality patient-centered care across all units.

title: Human Resource Officer
description: Candidates must hold a Bachelor’s degree in Human Resource Management, have five years of relevant experience in a management design company, and be professionally registered. Strong knowledge of Ethiopian labor legislation, excellent English communication skills, teamwork orientation, and the ability to manage complex HR processes are required.

title: MARKETING MANAGER
description: The position is for a Marketing Manager at a real estate company, recruited by Bilcor Institute of Leadership, Coaching and Research. The role requires a bachelor’s degree in marketing or business (MBA preferred) and over five years of marketing experience, ideally within real estate. Candidates should possess strong digital marketing and analytics skills, along with a creative and data‑driven mindset.

title: Business Trainer and Coach
description: Candidates should hold a second degree in economics, finance, or related fields and possess at least five years of experience designing competency-based learning programs and coaching youth. Strong bilingual communication skills in Amharic and English, along with proven expertise in action‑learning methods and investor due diligence, are required.

title: Structural Engineer
description: The role requires a Degree in Related Fields. More than 2 to 5 years of relevant work experience preparing structural and working drawings is required. Professionally registered with the institute of  building design structure engineers.

title: HUMAN RESOURCES (HR) MANAGER
description: The role requires a Bachelor’s degree in HR or Business Administration (MBA preferred) with over five years of experience in human resources, including recruitment, performance management, organizational development, policy compliance, and employee engagement.

title: physiotherapist
description: Applicants should demonstrate a thorough understanding of human anatomy and physiology, proficiency in manual therapy and exercise program design, and familiarity with modalities such as ultrasound or electrical stimulation. Desired skills include experience in sports rehabilitation, pediatric physiotherapy, ergonomic assessment, research capabilities, and use of physiotherapy software.

title: Humanitarian Disarmament & Peacebuilding Coordinator
description: The Danish Refugee Council seeks a Humanitarian Disarmament & Peacebuilding Coordinator for its Addis Ababa Country Office. The role requires a Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in conflict management, development studies, or related fields, and at least five years of relevant experience, with a minimum of three years in peacebuilding or mine action. Candidates must demonstrate strong English communication skills, project management, fundraising, and capacity‑development abilities.

title: Plumping or Sanitary Engineer
description: This role requires a BSc or MSc in Plumbing or Sanitary Engineering with at least five years of relevant experience. Candidates must be professionally registered, familiar with Ethiopian design standards, and proficient in office and design software. They should have hands‑on experience designing sprinkling systems, sewerage networks, and domestic water pipe systems, along with strong English communication skills.

title: Senior Nurse (Emergency & Critical Care, NICU, Pediatrics, Surgical, ICU & OR)
description: The Senior Nurse role requires a Bachelor's degree in Nursing and a valid professional nursing license, with 3–5 years of clinical experience in Emergency, Critical Care, NICU, Pediatrics, Surgical, ICU or OR settings. Candidates must demonstrate solid knowledge of clinical procedures, patient care standards, safety protocols, and possess strong leadership, supervision, decision‑making, communication, teamwork skills, and the ability to work under pressure.

title: Junior logistics and supply chain officer
description: The candidates must apply a Demonstrate strong coordination skills to effectively manage logistics activities. Utilize basic computer skills, including proficiency in MS Office applications. Communicate clearly and effectively in written and verbal forms.

title: WASH Officer
description: Candidates must hold a Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in WASH Engineering, Environmental Science, Public Health or related fields, and possess at least five years of experience managing humanitarian or development projects funded by major donors.

title: Physiotherapist
description: The candidates must hold a Bachelor's degree in Physiotherapy One year or Zero year experience.

title: Protection Officer
description: The position of Protection Officer at Lutheran World Federation (LWF) requires a holder of a Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in law, social studies or related fields and a minimum of five years of professional experience in protection programming.

title: Laboratory Technologist
description: The applicants must hold a Demonstrate proficiency in technical laboratory procedures and methodologies. Utilize clinical skills to perform accurate testing and analysis.

title: GRAPHICS DESIGNER
description: Diploma or Certificate in Graphic Design, Multimedia, or a related field with at least 1 year of proven professional experience as a Graphic Designer.

title: Pharmacy Store Officer
description: The Pharmacy Store Officer will manage the storage, inventory, and distribution of pharmaceutical products within the facility. This role requires a Diploma or Bachelor's degree in Pharmacy and experience in pharmacy store or inventory management. Candidates must be detail‑oriented, organized, and possess strong communication skills to maintain compliance with regulatory standards.

title: GRAPHICS DESIGNER
description: The position requires a Diploma or Certificate in Graphic Design, Multimedia, or a related field. Candidates should have at least one year of proven professional experience as a Graphic Designer. A strong portfolio demonstrating branding, digital content, and campaign materials is essential.

title: Ophthalmic Nurse
description: The candidates must hold a Bachelor's/ Diploma in Ophthalmic Nursing. 3 Years and above experience with practical  kill in eye care service.

title: Receptionist
description: The position requires a Diploma or Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration or a related field. Candidates should have 1–2 years of experience in a receptionist or administrative role, preferably within a technology company. Strong communication and interpersonal skills are essential.

title: Junior Nurse (Emergency & Critical Care, NICU, Pediatrics, Surgical, ICU & OR)
description: The position requires a Bachelor of Science degree in Nursing from a recognized institution. Candidates must possess a valid professional nursing license in accordance with national regulations. Applicants should have 0–2 years of clinical experience, and fresh graduates are encouraged to apply.

title: Office Engineer (Civil/Construction)
description: The position requires a Bachelor’s degree in Civil Engineering or Construction Technology & Management from a recognized university.

title: Physiotherapist
description: The role requires a Bachelor's degree in Physiotherapy (MSc is an advantage). Minimum 1–3 years of relevant clinical experience.

title: Lead Software Engineer
description: The position requires a Bachelor of Science degree in Software Engineering, Computer Science, or a related field. Candidates should have a minimum of six years of relevant professional experience.

title: Branch Supervisor
description: Diploma or Degree in Hotel Management, Business Administration, or a related field of study with a minimum of 2 years of progressive experience in the hospitality sector (restaurant, coffee house, or bakery). Must have essential computer literacy with practical experience in Microsoft Word and Excel for reporting purposes.

title: Payroll & Compensation Officer (HR)
description: The role requires a Bachelor’s degree in Human Resources, Business Administration or related field, 3–5 years of payroll experience (preferably in a hospital setting), strong knowledge of local labor law, hands‑on HRIS experience, and high attention to detail.

title: MCP Coordinator
description: Holland Dairy is looking for a dedicated MCP Coordinator to manage and expand its raw milk supply chain. The role requires a BSc in Animal Science, Plant Science, Agriculture or a related field, coupled with five years of relevant experience in dairy operations.

title: Data Analyst
description:
Bachelor’s degree in Mathematics ,Statistics ,Physics ,Computer Science  and data Science or related field 
Duties and Responsibilities: - Data modeling, designing, and supporting data storage in the data mart 
-Perform various operations on data including validation, cleansing, and transformations to generate useful information

title: Social Media Strategist & Brand Lead
description: Candidates should demonstrate experience managing and scaling professional brand accounts with measurable results, possess deep technical knowledge of Instagram, TikTok, and Facebook algorithms, and be highly organized and proactive in leading a creative team toward a unified vision.

title: NICU Nurse
description: The NICU Nurse at Teklehaimanot General Hospital is responsible for delivering specialized care to newborns in the neonatal intensive care unit. This full‑time role focuses on patient monitoring, medication administration, and direct infant care such as feeding, bathing, and dressing. The nurse collaborates with a multidisciplinary team to create individualized care plans and educates parents on infant health and development.

title: HR Officer -GIT
description: The role requires a Bachelor’s degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, or a related field. This position is open to fresh graduates. Candidates should demonstrate strong organizational and time management skills, with the ability to prioritize tasks and support HR or administrative functions effectively.

Candidates must hold a bachelor’s degree in Procurement, Supply Chain Management, Business Administration, or a related field, and be fresh graduates. Proficiency in Microsoft Office, strong organizational skills, and fluency in English and Amharic are required.

Candidates must provide a portfolio of commercial food, lifestyle, or luxury brand work, a professional CV, and an equipment manifest listing available gear.

title: Senior Accountant
description:
Candidates should possess strong analytical skills, proficiency in ERP and advanced Excel, and experience in financial controls and risk management. They must be adaptable to changing regulations, able to prioritize multiple tasks, and capable of providing clear communication to stakeholders.

The role requires a seasoned professional at the senior career level who can collaborate across departments to enhance financial operations and drive informed decision‑making.

The role involves handling cash transactions and serving as the front desk receptionist for Alpha Cardiac and Medical Centre. Candidates should bring their CV and academic credentials either in person or via email.

Strong content creation skills are essential, including photography, high-quality post design, and video editing, along with a good understanding of digital marketing trends and audience engagement.

description: The position requires a BA Degree or Diploma in Procurement, Supply Chain Management, Business Administration, or a related field. Candidates must possess at least three years of relevant experience, preferably within a hospital setting. The role demands strong negotiation and communication skills, proficiency in Microsoft Office and BRISK ERP, and a solid understanding of procurement procedures and vendor management.

title: Senior finance officer

Candidates should have at least 3 years of experience in a senior finance or director-level position, preferably within trading, logistics, or import/export businesses. Strong financial management, strategic planning, and leadership skills are essential.

title: Senior HR Officer
description: The position requires a bachelor’s degree in human resources, business administration or a related field and a minimum of five years’ experience in an HR role. Candidates must be proficient with Microsoft Office, knowledgeable about labor laws and best HR practices, and possess strong organizational, communication and decision‑making skills.

title: Machine operator

Candidates should have a minimum of 2 years of relevant work experience. Strong attention to detail and accuracy, the ability to multitask effectively, a high level of initiative, and the capacity to work and communicate across all levels are essential.

title: Sales Manager
description: The role requires 3–10 years of experience as a Sales Manager, along with a proven track record of successfully leading sales teams and achieving or exceeding sales targets. Candidates should have a strong understanding of market dynamics, customer behavior, and competitor analysis, with the ability to develop and execute effective sales strategies.

description: Bachelor's Degree in Accounting, Banking, Management, or in a related field of study

title: Customer Service Officer
description: BA Degree in Accounting, Business Management, Management or in a related field of study with relevant work experience

description: A proven track record with a minimum of 7 years of experience in managing complex projects or operations, or social enterprise programs in emerging markets, e.g., in agricultural innovation, extension, research & development, marketing, product development, consulting or MEL in agriculture, public health, or education (including 3+ years in one of our countries of operation).
